education_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience
key_responsibilities: Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
relevant_data: Grafana Labs specializes in observability software with 25 million users and 7,000+ customers.
The company is a part of the open-source software community, providing observability tools that are widely used in IT systems.
It operates as a fully remote company with over 1,400 employees across 40+ countries.
Grafana Labs recently raised $270 million in a Series D funding round.
